# Roadmap

## Out of scope

- Caller-set safety limits (`maxParts`, `maxPartSize`). Future browser implementations enforce internal limits, not JS-tunable ones.
- `Content-Transfer-Encoding` (quoted-printable, base64). HTTP is 8-bit clean; this is an email-era feature.
- Folded headers and RFC 2047 encoded-words. Email syntax, banned or unused in HTTP.
- Multipart writing. Out of scope for a parser library.
